quick_skim.title: CRB-Optimal Arrays and Waveforms in Active Sensing: Role of Redundancy and Spatial Covariance of Array Geometry
quick_skim.abstract: This paper characterizes the performance limits of optimal array designs using orthogonal and coherent waveforms for both linear and planar arrays. For orthogonal waveforms, we show that the single-target Cramér-Rao Bound (CRB) depends on the sum of the so-called spatial variances of the transmit (Tx) and receive (Rx) arrays, or equivalently, the spatial variance of the sum co-array weighted by the multiplicities of the virtual sensors. This reveals that CRB-optimal geometries are inherently redundant, highlighting a fundamental trade-off between mean squared error (MSE) and identifiability in parameter estimation. Moreover, we derive optimal Tx-Rx sensor allocations given a total sensor budget and show that unequal allocation (favoring the Rx) is optimal even for nonredundant arrays, questioning conventional designs. We extend our results to planar arrays, providing a new general condition that the spatial covariances of the Tx and Rx arrays should satisfy for the optimal waveforms to direct power in the target direction. Additionally, we establish a connection between Diophantine equations and array geometries with equal CRB, along with a constructive method for designing such arrays. Our work provides new guidelines for and insights into optimal array and waveform design with relevance in emerging active sensing multiple-input multiple-output systems.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Optimal array design for active sensing applicable to SAR antenna geometry
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 适用于SAR天线几何形状的主动感知最优阵列设计
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 适用于SAR天线几何形状的主动感知最优阵列设计
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 适用于SAR天线几何形状的主动感知最优阵列设计
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper characterizes the performance limits of optimal array designs for active sensing, showing that CRB-optimal geometries are inherently redundant, with implications for SAR antenna array optimization.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文刻画了主动感知中最优阵列设计的性能极限，揭示了CRB最优几何结构的内在冗余特性，为合成孔径雷达天线阵列优化提供了理论依据。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文刻画了主动感知中最优阵列设计的性能极限，揭示了CRB最优几何结构的内在冗余特性，为合成孔径雷达天线阵列优化提供了理论依据。

quick_skim.title: Impact of Phase Errors on Distributed NTN Beam Focusing
quick_skim.abstract: This paper investigates distributed beam focusing for coordinated satellite constellations with phased arrays, motivated by future non-terrestrial network (NTN) systems. A geometric and channel model is developed by incorporating satellite positions, array orientations, antenna directivity, and polarization effects. Under ideal synchronization, the achievable coherent combining gain is analyzed for different constellation geometries, showing that maximum ratio transmission (MRT) enables quadratic scaling of the received power with the number of satellites. The impact of phase errors caused by residual synchronization, timing, mobility, and localization mismatches is then investigated. Closed-form expressions for the average coherent gain are derived for uniformly distributed timing offsets, demonstrating the transition from coherent to non-coherent combining. The results show that synchronization and timing mismatches reduce the coherent combining gain, while geometry dependent effects govern the resulting spatial focusing behavior. Numerical results further show that linear and circular constellations provide different focusing characteristics and spatial separation capabilities. However, MRT-based focusing results in strong sidelobes and limited spatial division capability, motivating the need for joint analog beamforming and digital precoding optimization to improve spatial selectivity and robustness against mobility and localization errors.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Investigates phased array beam focusing for satellite constellations, relevant to SAR antenna system design.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 研究卫星星座相控阵波束聚焦，与SAR天线系统设计相关。
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 研究卫星星座相控阵波束聚焦，与SAR天线系统设计相关。
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 研究卫星星座相控阵波束聚焦，与SAR天线系统设计相关。
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper models distributed beam focusing for satellite constellations with phased arrays, deriving closed-form gain expressions under phase errors, which informs design of precise antenna systems for applications like synthetic aperture radar.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该文针对非地面网络中的分布式波束聚焦问题，建立了包含卫星位置、阵列方向和天线极化的几何信道模型，分析了理想同步下的相干合并增益，并研究了由同步、定时和定位误差引起的相位误差影响，推导了均匀分布误差下的平均增益闭式解，为合成孔径雷达等需要精确波束成形的卫星天线系统提供了设计参考。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该文针对非地面网络中的分布式波束聚焦问题，建立了包含卫星位置、阵列方向和天线极化的几何信道模型，分析了理想同步下的相干合并增益，并研究了由同步、定时和定位误差引起的相位误差影响，推导了均匀分布误差下的平均增益闭式解，为合成孔径雷达等需要精确波束成形的卫星天线系统提供了设计参考。
